skills.name: build
skills.description: Build and run Godly Terminal in dev or production mode

skills.name: component
skills.description: Generate new UI components following the existing pattern

skills.name: feature
skills.description: Orchestrate feature development: GitHub issue, parallelizable plan, multi-agent spawning (Claude Code or Codex), PR, and staging build. Use for any new feature or improvement.

skills.name: tauri-command
skills.description: Add new Tauri IPC commands with Rust handler and TS service

skills.name: tidy-up-docs
skills.description: Audit, organize, and distill the docs/ investigation folder

skills.name: manual-testing
skills.description: Manually test a feature via MCP tools, document findings, and create a GitHub issue with improvement points

skills.name: fix-integration
skills.description: Run integration tests in a loop, diagnosing and fixing real failures until they pass (max 5 iterations). Never masks failures.

skills.name: learn-issue
skills.description: Analyze the conversation to detect bugs, UX issues, or missing features encountered during this session, then create GitHub issues for them.
